description_long: This is a modern, mustard-yellow sofa with a boxy silhouette and clean lines, featuring two large rectangular back cushions and a single, tufted seat cushion that spans the entire seating area. The sofa is equipped with two cylindrical bolster pillows placed at each end, adding both comfort and a touch of retro style. The armrests are straight, thick, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, matte fabric with subtle tufting on the seat for added texture. The sofa stands on short, dark legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile appearance. Overall, the design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A mustard-yellow, modern sofa with straight padded armrests, tufted seat, and two large back cushions, complemented by cylindrical bolster pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two back cushions, tufted seat, and both bolster pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the profile of the back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion profile seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose rectangular back cushions and a single, wide tufted seat cushion; two cylindrical bolster pillows at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a boxy, modern profile.
attribute_leg_design: Short, dark legs, likely wood or metal, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions; no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid mustard yellow fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufting on the seat cushion.
